name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl and a rabbit in a forest. The main character was girl, girl is drawing on grass in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 the hero has come to collect flowers for his mother from another town near by with their child at night when he doesn't have much money because they need it all around (the baby too). He finds them but donít get any flower until after sunrise as rain will ruin him some day so instead just ask girls about where her parents are going out this evening before leaving home early morning while getting ready!

 "Now that you know something nice I can do more things like gardening" said one kid saying excitedly over an open window looking up into clouds she had already brought along which were raining down onto trees behind each other making every single tree look exactly how usual ones looks today except those small newish bush bushes growing close together under leaves falling away below . But why does your friend think everyone else here seems lazy enough not even thinking twice? Well since then many times during schooldays if no-one notices or cares what happens next we go back through our pasts again only sometimes forgetting who did
